programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: Christy and Jill make a surprising discovery when they take Emily to see her biological mother in rehab; Bonnie watches Adam's dog while he's out of town.

programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: Christy encourages Bonnie to seek help from her newfound brother, Ray, when Bonnie gets into trouble with the IRS.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff tries to solve a problem that Audrey has with a neighbor, but he ends up making it worse.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey decide to have separate bedrooms when his snoring keeps her awake, but he takes advantage of his newfound freedom by staying up too late.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: The Butlers and Johnsons decide to go on a double date, and they all get more than they bargained for at a new restaurant; Grover invites Malcolm and Marty to be the first guests on his new podcast.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Dave and Tina discover a common bond when they attend a concert together; Gemma seeks the Butlers' help when an unwelcome visitor takes up residence in the Johnson home.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: After losing everything, the Rose's are forced to move to their only remaining asset, the town of Schitt's Creek.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny tries to get permission to sell the town; David and Alexis spend a night out with the locals.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny tries to have an offensive sign removed; David searches for a job.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira attempt to get to know their children; Alexis believes that Mutt is having an affair with the mayor's wife.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: When Johnny and Moira use the mayor's cabin for the night, Alexis and David throw a party.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira is hired to be a local winery's spokesperson; David struggles with a health problem.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David joins some townies on a turkey hunt; Jocelyn and Moira have a spa day; Alexis meets Ted, the town veterinarian.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira and David try to sell cosmetics to the locals; Johnny tries to collect unemployment insurance.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny agrees to speak at a stranger's funeral; Alexis struggles with her boyfriend's love of animals.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira go to Roland's Hawaiian party; Alexis and Ted host a dinner party; David and Stevie's relationship heats up.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira's sister Deedee visits; David agrees to talk to a student about being different.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny tries to plan a surprise party for Moira's birthday, but she ends up taking over his plans.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny finds a potential buyer for the town; David and Alexis realize they have become attached to Schitt's Creek.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Roses search for their missing son; even though she's engaged to Ted, Alexis takes her relationship with Mutt to the next level.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira decides to cook dinner with David's help; Johnny looks at an office for his business; Alexis comes clean with Ted.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira tries to join the a cappella group; Alexis enjoys her new relationship; Johnny helps out at Bob's Garage.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira go to an estate sale; Mutt gives Alexis a bike; Roland asks for David's help to shop for a special item.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny convinces himself to have a partnership with Bob; David has an interview at a clothing store; Moira takes care of Alexis.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira tries to beautify the town; David misuses the company credit card; a grooming misstep forces Alexis and Mutt to question their relationship.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny considers running for town council; David and Stevie look for love; Alexis copes with being single.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny gets thrown into the raw milk business; Moira tries to connect with the townspeople; David gives style advice.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira is worried that racy photos from her past will jeopardize the campaign; Johnny asks for financial help; Alexis gets a job.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira meet with a key demographic; Alexis struggles with her new job; David offers emotional support to his boss' daughter.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira have to deal with a surprise motel guest; Alexis and David go apartment hunting.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira's campaign takes a turn when some of her lawn signs mysteriously disappear; David and Alexis must work together to get David's boss out of legal trouble.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira see a couple they knew in a past life; Alexis and David go to Mutt's annual barn party.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny searches for a new purpose; Moira faces the realities of politics.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Stevie try to come to terms with their new relationship; Alexis and Moira plan a mother/daughter lunch.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira try to get a deal on a used car; David helps Stevie put her great aunt to rest.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira worry about the future of the motel; David panics at the thought of retaking his driving test.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny puts the motel in jeopardy when he rents rooms to a dubious enterprise; David helps Moira with a film audition.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Stevie pitch a deal to a nearby golf course; Moira tries to get out of Twyla's murder mystery party.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David comes up with a new business venture; Alexis adjusts to her first day of school.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: While setting up his business, David meets a new friend; Johnny defends Alexis' work; Moira deals with a difficult guest.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira and Roland end up in a compromising situation; Alexis comes in between David and Patrick.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David's ex comes to town to do a photoshoot for Moira; Johnny and Roland think Bob is cheating at poker.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny tries to stop the spread of lice; Moira tries to get out of having a garden named after her.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira look for a location for the family portrait; David hosts a soft launch for the new store.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Stevie celebrate having a fully booked hotel; David and Patrick go on a date.

programme.desc: Moira feels responsible for a hotel guest's death; David and Patrick make their romance official.
